title: elaphoglossum oophyllum
intro: Elaphoglossum oophyllum is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum oophyllum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, with some studies suggesting its extracts may have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties.
